## OpenSpec

<!-- Only fill this section if the PR implements or relates to an OpenSpec change -->

- **Change ID**: `add-...` <!-- e.g. add-rapid-orchestration-pipeline -->
- [ ] `openspec validate --strict` passes
- [ ] OpenSpec change has been archived (`openspec archive <change-id> --yes`)
- [ ] `doc/` checked and updated if stale
- [ ] `npm run sync:context` run if `openspec/project.md` or `.ai/` was modified

## Checklist

- [ ] I have tested these changes locally (Free Tier + Premium Tier where applicable)
- [ ] My code follows the existing code style (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] `npm run build` passes (no TypeScript errors)

- [ ] I have added or updated documentation if needed
